hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT DES.CORREO_DESTINO AS "correoDestino" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.ID_CORREO = :id_correo

SELECT DES.ID_CORREO AS "idCorreo", DES.CORREO_DESTINO AS "correoDestino", DES.ID_TIPO_DESTINO AS "idTipoDestino", DES.NOMBRE_PERSONA AS "nombrePersona", DES.ID_PERSONA AS "idPersona", DES.ESTADO AS "estado" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.ID_CORREO = :id_correo
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.ID_CORREO = :id_correo
